site.name: Expo Time
site.tagline: We craft excellence at every exhibition
site.description: Expo Time is Saudi Arabia's premier exhibition stand design and fabrication company. We deliver world-class custom and modular exhibition stands, event management, and brand activation solutions.
site.address: Anas Ibn Malik St., Al Yasmin District, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia

hero.title: We Craft Excellence
hero.subtitle: From Riyadh to NEOM — we design and build extraordinary exhibition stands that reflect your brand identity and attract visitors

services.title: Our Comprehensive Services
services.subtitle: Complete exhibition stand and event solutions across Saudi Arabia

standDesign.title: Exhibition Stand Design
standDesign.description: We design extraordinary exhibition stands that reflect your brand identity and attract visitors with professional 3D visualizations

customBooths.title: Custom Exhibition Booths
customBooths.description: Bespoke booths designed specifically to meet your requirements with the highest quality standards in execution and finishing

modularBooths.title: Modular Booths
modularBooths.description: Flexible and scalable solutions that deliver the best value for participating in multiple exhibitions

eventManagement.title: Event Management
eventManagement.description: Complete event management from planning to execution with a specialized team and extensive experience

conferenceManagement.title: Conference Management
conferenceManagement.description: World-class conference and forum organization with integrated audio-visual solutions

brandActivations.title: Brand Activations
brandActivations.description: Innovative interactive experiences that enhance your brand presence and create unforgettable impressions

temporaryStructures.title: Temporary Structures
temporaryStructures.description: High-quality temporary structures for outdoor exhibitions and large-scale events

eventProduction.title: Event Production
eventProduction.description: Comprehensive event production including sound, lighting, décor, and logistics management

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Ten Years of Excellence in the Exhibition Industry
about.description: Since 2015, Expo Time has been delivering comprehensive exhibition stand and event solutions across Saudi Arabia. With over 10 years of experience, we are proud to have served over 5000 clients across various industries.
about.missionText: To be the premier strategic partner for our clients in the exhibition industry, delivering creative and innovative solutions that strengthen their presence in local and international markets.
about.visionText: To be the leading company in exhibition stand design and fabrication in the Middle East and North Africa, driven by innovation, quality, and sustainability.
